description: This file defines locative expressions in Njo Viri (Balanda). Locatives indicate spatial reference such as 'here' and 'there'.

copular_structure.structure: {"pattern": "Subject + no + kono/kana", "note": "Locatives often follow the copula 'no'."}
copular_structure.notes: Subject + no + kono/kana | Locatives often follow the copula 'no'.

verbal_structure.structure: {"pattern": "Verb + kono/kana", "note": "Locatives may follow verbs without an additional copula."}
verbal_structure.notes: Verb + kono/kana | Locatives may follow verbs without an additional copula.

error_constraints.structure: Do not omit locative markers when expressing location.; Distinguish clearly between 'kono' (here) and 'kana' (there).
